responses: Hello! I am here to help.
Hi! Ask me anything about this chatbot project or start with a simple greeting.
Hey! I am ready to chat.
I am doing well and ready to help with your chatbot project.
I am working smoothly. You can ask me project questions whenever you are ready.
I am doing great. How can I help you today?
I am an AI internship chatbot built with NLP, deep learning, Flask, and optional LLM support.
I am a project chatbot that can answer FAQs, classify intents, extract simple entities, and help explain the project.
Yes, I am online and ready to answer your questions.
I am active. You can ask me about AI, NLP, deep learning, the project workflow, or internship preparation.
Goodbye! Keep building and experimenting.
See you later. Good luck with your AI project!
You are welcome!
Glad I could help.
Artificial Intelligence is the field of building systems that can perform tasks requiring human-like intelligence, such as learning, reasoning, and language understanding.
AI allows machines to learn from data and make decisions or predictions.
Natural Language Processing is a branch of AI that helps computers understand, process, and generate human language.
NLP combines linguistics, machine learning, and deep learning to work with text and speech.
Deep learning uses neural networks with multiple layers to learn patterns from data. In this project, it classifies user messages into intents.
TensorFlow and Keras help build and train the neural network used by the chatbot.
The chatbot preprocesses text, converts it to bag-of-words features, predicts the intent using a neural network, extracts simple entities, and returns a suitable response.
The main modules are NLP preprocessing, intent classification, entity recognition, response generation, and Flask deployment.
This project uses Python, NLTK, TensorFlow/Keras, NumPy, and Flask.
The tech stack includes NLP with NLTK, deep learning with Keras, and deployment with Flask.
Yes. I can extract simple entities such as names, emails, phone numbers, dates, times, and AI-related topics.
This project includes lightweight entity recognition using regex and keyword rules.

patterns: I want to apply for an internship
How can I apply for internship?
What should I include in my resume?
responses: For an AI internship, highlight Python, machine learning basics, NLP projects, GitHub links, and clear documentation.
Build a clean project, write a strong README, add screenshots, and explain your model, dataset, and results.
I am still learning. Please ask about AI, NLP, deep learning, chatbot architecture, tools, or internships.
I do not have enough information for that yet. Try asking a project-related FAQ.
